sqlMap.select: SELECT distinct folder.folder_id as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.folder_upper ) as parent, folder.folder_name1 as text from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(folder.FOLDER_PATH, '|' ,3), '|', -1) in( select distinct folder.folder_id FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and user.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.company_id = #comId# and (user.USER_ID IN ( select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or dept.cn = #deptId#) or user.USER_ID = #userId# or user.USER_ID = #comId#) ) and folder.use_status = 'Y' or (folder.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' and folder.folder_type = #folderType# AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id = #comId# and folder.use_status = 'Y' AND ( folder.OWNER_ID = #comId# or folder.OWNER_ID IN ( select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or dept.cn = #deptId#) )) order by folder.create_date
SELECT FOLDER_UPPER FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT DISTINCT type.TYPE_ICON , folder.FOLDER_PATH, folder.FOLDER_NAME1, file.FILE_ID , file.FILE_NAME , file.FILE_PATH , file.FILE_SIZE , file.TYPE_ID , file.DOWN_COUNT , file.FILE_EXT , file.FOLDER_ID , file.USE_STATUS , file.CREATE_ID , file.CREATE_NAME1, file.CREATE_NAME2, file.CREATE_DATE as CREATE_DATE, file.UPDATE_ID , file.UPDATE_DATE , file.TENANT_ID FROM (TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS file LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_webfolder_filetype AS type ON type.TYPE_ID = file.TYPE_ID ) left join tbl_webfolder_folder folder on file.folder_id = folder.folder_Id WHERE file.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and file.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.company_id = #comId#
file.FILE_EXT LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchExt#, '%')
file.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchCreateName#, '%')
type.TYPE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileType#, '%')
file.FILE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileName#, '%')
and SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(folder.FOLDER_PATH, '|' ,3), '|', -1) in( select distinct folder.folder_id FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and user.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.company_id = #comId# and (user.USER_ID IN (select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or dept.cn = #deptId#) or user.USER_ID = #userId# or user.USER_ID = #comId#) )
and folder.FOLDER_PATH like CONCAT ('|', #folderId#,'%') ORDER BY CREATE_DATE LIMIT #pStart#, #pEnd#
and SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(folder.FOLDER_PATH, '|' ,3), '|', -1) in( select distinct folder.folder_id FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and user.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.company_id = #comId# and (user.USER_ID IN (select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or dept.cn = #deptId#) or user.USER_ID = #userId# or user.USER_ID = #comId#) )
and folder.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#
union all select DISTINCT type.TYPE_ICON AS TYPE_ICON , folder.FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH , folder.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1 , folder.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID , folder.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME , folder.FOLDER_PATH AS FILE_PATH , 0 AS FILE_SIZE , "folder" AS TYPE_ID , 0 AS DOWN_COUNT , "folder" AS FILE_EXT , folder.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID , folder.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS , folder.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID , folder.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1 , folder.CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2 , folder.CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE , folder.UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID , folder.UPDATE_DATE AS UPDTAE_DATE , folder.TENANT_ID as TENANT_ID from tbl_webfolder_filetype AS type LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_webfolder_folder as folder ON type.TYPE_NAME = "folder" where folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.folder_upper = #folderId# and folder.company_id = #comId# ORDER BY CREATE_DATE desc LIMIT #pStart#, #pEnd#

select count(*) from (SELECT DISTINCT file.FILE_ID FROM (TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE AS file LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_webfolder_filetype AS type ON type.TYPE_ID = file.TYPE_ID ) left join tbl_webfolder_folder folder on file.folder_id = folder.folder_Id WHERE file.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and file.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.company_id = #comId#
folder.FOLDER_PATH like CONCAT ('|', #folderId#,'%')
folder.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#
file.FILE_EXT LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchExt#), '%')
file.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchCreateName#), '%')
type.TYPE_NAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchFileType#), '%')
file.FILE_NAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchFileName#), '%')
ORDER BY file.CREATE_DATE
) as fileJoin

SELECT distinct folder.folder_id as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.folder_upper ) as parent, folder.folder_name1 as text from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(folder.FOLDER_PATH, '|' ,3), '|', -1) in( select distinct folder.folder_id FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and user.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id = #comId# and (user.USER_ID IN (select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or dept.cn = #deptId#) or user.USER_ID = #userId# or user.USER_ID = #comId#) ) or (folder.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id =#comId# and folder.use_status = 'Y' and folder.OWNER_ID = #comId#) or (folder.use_status = 'Y' AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.COMPANY_ID = #comId# and (folder.OWNER_ID = #userId# or folder.OWNER_ID = #deptId# or folder.OWNER_ID = #comId# or folder.OWNER_ID IN ( select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or dept.cn = #deptId#) )) order by folder.FOLDER_TYPE, folder.CREATE_DATE

SELECT distinct folder_id as id ,if( folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder_upper )as parent, folder_name1 as text from tbl_webfolder_folder where TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and USE_STATUS = 'Y' order by create_date

select distinct folder.FOLDER_ID as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.FOLDER_UPPER )as parent, folder.FOLDER_NAME1 as text from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.FOLDER_ID = user.FOLDER_ID where folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.use_status = 'Y' AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.COMPANY_ID = #comId# and folder.OWNER_ID = #userId# order by folder.create_date

SELECT distinct folder.folder_id as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.folder_upper ) as parent, folder.folder_name1 as text from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where ( folder.folder_type = #folderType# AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id = #comId# and folder.use_status = 'Y' AND ( folder.OWNER_ID IN ( select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where DEPT_CD_PATH like concat('%',#deptId#,'%') or DEPT_CD_PATH regexp (select group_concat(deptid separator '|' ) as cn from tbl_addjobmaster where cn =#userId# )) )) order by folder.create_date
SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and COMPANY_ID = #comId# and FOLDER_ID = #folderUppId#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #comId# and CN = #userId#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT MAX(CONVERT(FOLDER_ID ,UNSIGNED))+1 FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER( FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES( #id#, #folderName1#, #folderName2#, #folderType#, concat(#folderPath#,#id#,'|'), #folderStep#, #folderLevel#, #folderUppId#, 'Y', #ownerId#, #userId#, SYSDATE(), #createName1#, #createName2#, #userId#, SYSDATE(), #comId#, #tenantId# )

SELECT MAX(CONVERT(SEQ_ID,UNSIGNED))+1 FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER ( SEQ_ID, USER_ID, USER_TYPE, FOLDER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #id#, #userId#, #userType#, #folderId#, #createId#, #createDate#, #comId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT if(MAX(FOLDER_STEP) is not null, +1,0) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_UPPER = #folderUppId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT distinct folder.folder_id as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.folder_upper ) as parent, folder.folder_name1 as text, folder.owner_id as owner from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(folder.FOLDER_PATH, '|' ,3), '|', -1) in( select distinct folder.folder_id FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and user.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.company_id = #comId# and (user.USER_ID IN ( select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or dept.cn = #deptId#) or user.USER_ID = #userId# or user.USER_ID = #comId#)
) and folder.use_status = 'Y' or ( folder.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' and folder.folder_type = #folderType# AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id = #comId# and folder.use_status = 'Y' AND folder.owner_id = #deptId# ) order by folder.create_date
select DEPTID as cn from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select cn from tbl_addjobmaster where DEPTID = #deptId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select cn , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 from tbl_deptmaster where DEPT_CD_PATH like concat('%',#deptId#,'%')

SELECT count(owner_id) FROM tbl_webfolder_folder WHERE tenant_id =#tenantId# and company_id = #comId# and folder_type = #folderType# and folder_upper='root'
owner_id = #comId#
owner_id = #deptId#
owner_id = #userId#
select cn , displayname, displayname2 ,EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 ,EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 from tbl_deptmaster WHERE tenant_id =#tenantId# and cn =#deptId#

SELECT f.folder_id as id , if( f.folder_upper = 'root', '##', f.folder_upper ) as parent, f.folder_name1 as text, f.owner_id as owner
FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER f JOIN ( select d1.*
from tbl_deptmaster d1 left outer join tbl_addjobmaster a on(d1.cn = a.deptid AND d1.TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID ) where (a.CN = #userId# OR d1.CN = #deptId#) AND d1.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
union
select d2.* from tbl_deptmaster d2 right join (select DEPT_CD_PATH,TENANT_ID from tbl_deptmaster where EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) as a on d2.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE concat(a.DEPT_CD_PATH, "%") and d2.TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID
) AS s ON f.OWNER_ID = s.CN AND f.TENANT_ID = s.TENANT_ID AND f.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# AND f.OWNER_ID = s.CN WHERE f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND f.USE_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY f.FOLDER_LEVEL ASC, f.FOLDER_STEP ASC
